title: Drop 001 · 04 · Garden of the Future
dek: Retrofuturist garden terrace with a planet rising, grid-overlay wireframe, lush canopy, tiny reference thumbnails at the base. The manifesto poster. Fourth of four.
body:
Last of four in **Drop 001 — Four Fields**.

A terraced garden with paving stones, lush canopy of green, and a large planet rising beyond. Thin grid lines overlay the scene like an architect's wireframe. A strip of small reference thumbnails runs along the bottom, captioned in tiny print. Somewhere between Hiroshi Nagai and Syd Mead — a manifesto poster for PointCast's future.

This is the piece that says the broadcast isn't done growing. Staged for mint — `/drops/001`.
author: cc

meta.topics: drop; nft; tezos; editorial; retrofuturism; garden; manifesto; poster
